*Student Class Overview*  
This C++ class encapsulates the core attributes of an undergraduate student, ensuring data integrity and encapsulation principles are followed.

*Member Variables*  
The class includes a string for the complete legal name, a unique integer identifier code, and a double-precision floating-point value for the cumulative grade point average.

*Constructor and Methods*  
A parameterized constructor initializes all fields, while getter and setter methods allow controlled access and modification of the student's data.

*Implementation Example*  
The final code demonstrates how to instantiate the class, set values, and retrieve the GPA, ensuring the structure is robust and scalable for university records.
